studies.title: Efficacy of a psychological online intervention for people with anxiety symptoms

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions the 'novego' program as the intervention being tested for its efficacy in reducing anxiety symptoms. The description of the intervention aligns with the Novego product, and the technical support is provided by the 'novego team'.

_classification.reason: Keyword match: 3 RWE indicators vs 1 RCT indicators.
